Title: Frizzoni, Gustavo
Overview: Scholar of renaissance Italian art. A friend and disciple of Giovanni Morelli, he edited the final volume of Morelli's collected works and wrote a brief biography of him in 1893.
Selected Bibliography: edited, Die Galerien zu Berlin, volume three of Morelli, Giovanni. Kunstkritische Studien über italienische Malerei. Leipzig: F. A. Brockhaus, 1893.
